summary: AWS External DNS Health Tracking feature testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. The feature integrates real AWS Route 53 health checks - NO MOCKED APIs.

warnings.description: WebSocket notification connection fails on page load - not related to AWS DNS Health feature
warnings.details: WebSocket connection to /api/ws/notifications fails - this is a pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: AWS DNS Health service properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
Error handling for AWS ClientError is implemented correctly
Frontend properly displays status badges and region grid
data-testid attributes are properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test targets created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AWS DNS Health feature fully tested. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Auth returns 'access_token' not 'token'. Existing target bigmannentertainment.com shows 'unhealthy' status - this is expected real-world behavior as HTTPS times out.

backend_apis.POST /api/aws-dns/targets: PASS - Creates real Route 53 health check and saves to MongoDB
backend_apis.GET /api/aws-dns/targets: PASS - Lists all registered targets for current user
backend_apis.POST /api/aws-dns/targets/{id}/refresh: PASS - Refreshes status from AWS Route 53, returns checker regions
backend_apis.DELETE /api/aws-dns/targets/{id}: PASS - Deletes target from MongoDB and AWS Route 53 health check
backend_apis.GET /api/aws-dns/aws-checks: PASS - Lists all Route 53 health checks in AWS account
backend_apis.Authentication: PASS - All endpoints require valid JWT token

frontend_ui.DNS Lookup tab: PASS - Domain input, record type selector, results display
frontend_ui.Health Check tab: PASS - Health score ring, check details display
frontend_ui.Monitors tab: PASS - Add monitor form, monitor cards
frontend_ui.AWS Health tab: PASS - Register form, advanced options, target cards, status badges, region grid

aws_health_tab_details.register_form: PASS - Domain input, register button, advanced options toggle
aws_health_tab_details.advanced_options: PASS - Protocol select, port input, path input, interval select
aws_health_tab_details.target_cards: PASS - Domain display, status badge, config details, last checked time
aws_health_tab_details.region_grid: PASS - 16 AWS health checker regions displayed with UP/DOWN status
aws_health_tab_details.delete_button: PASS - Deletes target and AWS health check

mocked_data_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All AWS Route 53 calls are real
